CommunityApplications.Profile:
Apps by Jos Nienhuis.
## GarageStack An open-source vehicle monitoring dashboard for MG / SAIC electric and plug-in hybrid vehicles. Connects to the MG iSmart cloud via the SAIC MQTT Gateway and stores all data locally. Features include a live dashboard, charging and efficiency statistics, trip history with heatmap visualisation, and Web Push notifications. Everything runs in a single container.
For support and bug reports visit the [GitHub issues page](https://github.com/joszz/garagestack/issues).
